sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 2), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, isNotDistinctFrom(value, NULL) AS is_value_null FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = 3 WHERE isNotDistinctFrom(value, NULL);
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE isNotDistinctFrom(value, 2);
